title: Trading Direkt 2026-06-12 | GAMEDAY TV –AVSNITT 4: Kvinnor inom Gaming & riskminimering. Tobbe TA
summary_md:
# Trading Direkt 2026-06-12 | GAMEDAY TV –AVSNITT 4: Kvinnor inom Gaming & riskminimering. Tobbe TA

**Feed**: trading-direkt  
**Published**: 2026-06-12  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

Episode 4 of GameDay TV (within Trading Direkt) wraps up an ecosystem series on Nordic gaming companies, featuring interviews on diversity (Jenny Brusk) and data-driven risk reduction (André Persson), followed by Tobbe Rosén's technical analysis of broad markets and a basket of gaming stocks. The macro backdrop is cautious — OMXS30 printed a lower high and sits in a range with the 3000 level as the key watershed, VIX has spiked above 20, and gold/silver are weak while copper and the USD strengthen. Across individual gaming names the picture is split: setups like Embracer, MTG, Remedy, Nitro Games and Kinda Brave lean bullish, while Coffee Stain, Nintendo, Roblox, Stillfront, Sony and Take-Two look bearish.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟢 EMBRAC-B — Embracer Group | **BUY** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Pullback into FIB38-50 support with a positive minidivergence; cycle indicator deep; awaiting a positive continuation candlestick from support.

#### Reasoning

Price retraced to the FIB38-50 zone coinciding with cloud span B and MA200, while the 5-period stochastic cycle indicator turned up from a deep low forming a positive minidivergence. Volatility is below average, favoring a continuation formation off support. No confirming bullish candlestick yet, so the stance is only weakly positive pending that trigger.

#### Sell Triggers

- if cloud span B / FIB50 is broken without quick recovery
- if cycle indicator runs up too far before a buy signal
- if no positive candlestick formation appears at support

> *"Jag är svagt positiv till en bracer."*

---

### 🟢 MTG-B — MTG (Modern Times Group) | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Strong +7.8% gap on Q1 report; pullback to strong support at the gap midpoint with volatility cooling below average, setting up a continuation from support.

#### Reasoning

The Q1 report produced a clear +7.8% gap and further upside; price has fallen back to strong support formed by the gap midpoint and lower gap edge. Volatility, which had warned of a top, has dropped below average, so a continuation formation around support is favored — exactly what appears to be forming. Trend indicator sits in the positive trend-following zone.

#### Sell Triggers

- if there is a weak close under the 123 level
- if the gap gets filled to the downside
- if the trend indicator turns down from extreme highs into a durable top

> *"Jag är för tillfället positiv till MTG och tror på fortsatt uppgång."*

---

### 🟢 REMEDY — Remedy Entertainment | **BUY** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 60%

Broke above the cloud with laggard line above both price and cloud; fresh MACD buy signal; trend indicator in positive trend-following zone.

#### Reasoning

Although overbought and trading above a short-term rising channel, price has broken up through the Ichimoku cloud and the lagging line is above both price and cloud — structurally bullish. The stochastic MACD just issued a buy signal and the trend-phase indicator is in the zone where positive trend-following strategies are recommended. Volume balance is a bit weaker than desired.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price falls back below the cloud
- if the overbought condition resolves with a break of the rising channel
- if volume balance deteriorates

> *"Så jag är positiv till Remedy."*

---

### 🟠 NTES — NetEase | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Flat primary trend but building a base; price above cloud, turning line over standard line, positive volume balance — loading for a more positive period.

#### Reasoning

After a rounding/base formation NetEase has broken up over a contraction with price above the cloud, the turning line over the standard line and positive volume balance. It increasingly looks like a base is forming to load for a more positive period. Full confirmation would come if the lagging line also rises above the cloud; Ichimoku still warns of choppy moves.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price falls back below the cloud
- if the lagging line fails to clear the cloud
- if volume balance turns negative

> *"allt mer tycker jag som ser ut som att den håller på att bygga en bas. För att ladda upp för en positivare period."*

---

### 🟠 PDX — Paradox Interactive | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 50%

Squeeze possibly resolving upward; positive volume balance as price approaches resistance suggests buyers accumulating and a possible bottom forming.

#### Reasoning

Tobbe initially flagged a negative bias but, on inspecting the squeeze indicator, notes the squeeze may be resolving with a break up out of the range. Positive volume balance as price nears resistance inside the contraction implies buyers are quietly accumulating, giving good odds Paradox is building a bottom. Ichimoku still warns of choppy moves, so it is a watch rather than an outright buy.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the squeeze resolves to the downside instead
- if volume balance turns negative at resistance
- if price fails to break out of the range

> *"jag tror att det är ganska goda förutsättningar för att Paradox håller på att bygga någon form av botten här. Så jag tycker ändå att den här ser väldigt spännande ut."*

---

### 🟢 NITRO — Nitro Games | **BUY** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 45%

High volatility with a negative reversal/divergence; elevated trend indicator that, if it turns down, signals topping risk. Positive but expecting a challenging retest.

#### Reasoning

Volatility is clearly above average alongside a negative divergence and a sharp negative reversal close, with today continuing the weak look. The trend-phase indicator is still high; a turn down from here would indicate sizeable risk of a top and a challenging decline. Tobbe stays positive overall but flags high probability of a demanding retest before any continuation.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the trend indicator turns down from its elevated level
- if volatility stays elevated into further weakness
- if the negative reversal pattern follows through lower

> *"Jag är positiv till Nitro Games men det är stor risk för att vi kommer få se ett utmanande omtag."*

---

### 🟠 U — Unity Software | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 45%

Two recent positive minidivergences and three dojis at support; taking out the doji highs can trigger a 3-5 day rally.

#### Reasoning

Unity shows two positive minidivergences over the last days plus an unusual cluster of three dojis at support. Tobbe finds it interesting: if buyers return around this support level it is very promising, and taking out the small dojis' highs often triggers a 3-5 day move up. Conversely, breaking the dojis' lows frequently triggers a downleg, so it is a watch pending direction.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the dojis' lows are punctured
- if buyers fail to return at the support level

> *"just när små dågissars högsta tas ut så är det stor chans att det är triggande uppgång på 3-5 dagar."*

---

### 🟠 EG7 — Enad Global 7 | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 40%

Cycle indicator low but no positive minidivergence yet; thin cloud offers weak support; still in positive trend-following zone awaiting a candlestick signal.

#### Reasoning

The cycle indicator is low but too far back in time, and no positive minidivergence has formed; no positive candlestick formation has appeared since price punctured the standard line. The approaching cloud is thin and offers little support, so a move under 17.30 favors a decline toward 14.30-14.50. Still, on a longer view the trend indicator remains in the positive trend-following zone, so wait for a confirming candlestick.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price falls below 17.30
- if the thin cloud fails as support
- if no positive candlestick formation forms

> *"Vi väntar ju in då en så kallad positiv candlesticksformation som troligtvis är värd att agera på."*

---

### 🟠 ASMODEE — Asmodee | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 45%

In a pullback after topping above the trend indicator (+7.6); very positive volume balance but no positive candlestick yet, so buyers have not shown.

#### Reasoning

Asmodee topped after the trend indicator pushed above +7, and is now in a rekyl with no positive continuation candlestick since the decline began. Fibonacci suggests a continuation formation could be actionable down toward ~122 kr, but the setup is stretched and volatility is still above average, so wait for a positive candlestick while the cycle indicator is low. Volume balance is very positive — a constructive backdrop once buyers confirm.

#### Sell Triggers

- if no positive candlestick formation forms near 122 kr
- if volatility stays elevated into further downside
- if price extends the pullback below the FIB support

> *"en positiv candlesticksformation här ser jag som värd att agera på. Volymbalansen är mycket positiv dessutom. Men vi har ju inte fått någon"*

---

### 🟠 GBK — Goodbye Kansas | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Neutral | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 40%

Squeeze — Bollinger bands captured inside Keltner bands; a low-volatility setup that can resolve into a powerful move in either direction.

#### Reasoning

Goodbye Kansas is in a squeeze with Bollinger bands captured inside the Keltner bands (indicator shows red over green), signaling a low-volatility regime and risk of choppy moves. If volume balance rises toward resistance and price breaks up over the cloud with the lagging line above price, it can lead to a very forceful move — up on an upside break, down on a downside break. Worth monitoring rather than acting yet.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price breaks down out of the range with rising volume
- if the squeeze resolves to the downside

> *"det är alltid intressant att bevaka sådana här squeeze-formationer som vara länge."*

---

### ⛔ COFF-B — Coffee Stain Group | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Testing FIB62 with price under it; a weak close not quickly retaken targets the low around 15.70-16 kr. Trend indicator in equilibrium (choppy) zone.

#### Reasoning

For the prior advance, price is testing FIB62 and a weak close below that level, if not promptly retaken, sets sights on the low around 15.70-16 kr. Price already trades under the relevant level, so Tobbe is negative for now and will stay so until something changes. The trend-phase indicator sits in the equilibrium-pendulum zone, warning of choppy, slingy moves.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price reclaims and holds above FIB62
- if a positive candlestick formation appears at support
- if trend indicator exits the equilibrium zone upward

> *"det innebär att jag är negativ till action. Det kommer vara det. Till dess att vi ser att det händer någonting annat."*

---

### ⛔ NTDOY — Nintendo | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Punctured FIB62 with no signs of buyers returning; deeply oversold so a bounce is likely but seen as a pause in the downtrend.

#### Reasoning

Nintendo has punctured FIB62 and there are no signs buyers are returning. It is very oversold, so some form of bounce is likely, but such bounces are interpreted as a pause within the existing decline. As long as the most recent short-term top is not taken out, more points to further downside than upside, keeping the stance negative.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the most recent short-term top is taken out
- if buyers reappear and reclaim FIB62

> *"Så jag har negativt i action."*

---

### ⛔ RBLX — Roblox | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

In a range / low-volatility setup; a break below the range low could trigger a powerful move south. Down 53% over 6 months (worst of the basket).

#### Reasoning

Roblox sits in a range with a clear low-volatility condition. Such regimes are typically followed by forceful expansion; while these often break up, here a puncture of the range's lowest level could make the expansion powerful to the downside. Given price action and the worst relative performance in the basket (-53% over 6 months), Tobbe is negative as it stands.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price reclaims the range and breaks upward instead
- if a low-volatility breakout resolves to the upside

> *"Så jag är negativ till Roblox så som det ser ut nu."*

---

### ⛔ SONY — Sony Group | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Pulled to FIB62; if FIB62/FIB50 and cloud span B are not quickly retaken, downside risk to around 19.6 USD.

#### Reasoning

Sony has dropped to challenge FIB62; if FIB62, FIB50 and cloud span B are not quickly retaken, a decline at least toward ~19.6 USD is risked. The stochastic sits near the zero zone, which is support — a turn up from there would set up a higher high and possibly a bottom. For now, however, Tobbe is negative.

#### Sell Triggers

- if FIB62/FIB50 and cloud span B are quickly retaken
- if the stochastic turns up from the zero zone to make a higher high

> *"Men för tillfället så är jag negativ till Sony Group."*

---

### ⛔ SF — Stillfront | **AVOID** (Moderate)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 55%

Fell back to FIB50/cloud span B with laggards under price and cloud; a FIB62 break triggers a decline toward 3.43-3.50.

#### Reasoning

Stillfront has fallen back to FIB50 and cloud span B, and with the lagging lines under both price and cloud it is critical this level is respected; otherwise the risk is high that FIB62 is punctured, triggering a move toward 3.43-3.50. Tobbe is negative for now and reads bounces as pause formations in the downtrend; only a break above the standard line / MA200 and then the recent short-term top would flip the view.

#### Sell Triggers

- if price breaks above the standard line / MA200
- if the recent short-term top is taken out
- if FIB50 / cloud span B holds firmly as support

> *"Jag är än så länge negativ och ser uppstudsar som pausformationer i nedgången."*

---

### ⛔ TTWO — Take-Two Interactive | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Testing support at cloud span B just above FIB62; wants the level retaken quickly or risks a fall toward ~188 USD.

#### Reasoning

Take-Two is down testing support in the form of cloud span B, found just above FIB62. Tobbe wants that level taken out quickly; otherwise the risk is high that price falls all the way toward ~188 USD. On balance he is slightly negative.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the cloud span B / FIB62 support is reclaimed quickly
- if price falls toward 188 USD confirming weakness

> *"Så jag är lite negativ till Take-to-interactive."*

---

### ⛔ G5EN — G5 Entertainment | **AVOID** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Negative | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 45%

Failed breakout attempt with a negative reversal; price under MA200 and lagging line under the cloud, though some faint buyer signs in the gap.

#### Reasoning

G5 made a failed breakout attempt followed by a negative reversal, with price under MA200 and the lagging line above price but under the cloud. There are faint signs buyers are trying, and volume balance is not especially negative; a clear strong close above prior-day high and above cloud span B in the cloud would set up filling the Feb 17 Q4 gap. Until then the standard line holding is key and the bias is slightly negative.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the standard line fails to hold
- if no strong close above prior-day high and cloud span B appears
- if the negative reversal follows through

> *"Sen har vi G5 Entertainment som jag också är lite negativ till."*

---

signals.source_quote: Så jag är negativ till Roblox så som det ser ut nu.
signals.reasoning: Roblox sits in a range with a clear low-volatility condition. Such regimes are typically followed by forceful expansion; while these often break up, here a puncture of the range's lowest level could make the expansion powerful to the downside. Given price action and the worst relative performance in the basket (-53% over 6 months), Tobbe is negative as it stands.
sell_triggers: if price reclaims the range and breaks upward instead
if a low-volatility breakout resolves to the upside

signals.context: Pulled to FIB62; if FIB62/FIB50 and cloud span B are not quickly retaken, downside risk to around 19.6 USD.
signals.name: Sony Group
signals.source_quote: Men för tillfället så är jag negativ till Sony Group.
signals.reasoning: Sony has dropped to challenge FIB62; if FIB62, FIB50 and cloud span B are not quickly retaken, a decline at least toward ~19.6 USD is risked. The stochastic sits near the zero zone, which is support — a turn up from there would set up a higher high and possibly a bottom. For now, however, Tobbe is negative.
sell_triggers: if FIB62/FIB50 and cloud span B are quickly retaken
if the stochastic turns up from the zero zone to make a higher high

signals.context: Fell back to FIB50/cloud span B with laggards under price and cloud; a FIB62 break triggers a decline toward 3.43-3.50.
signals.name: Stillfront
signals.source_quote: Jag är än så länge negativ och ser uppstudsar som pausformationer i nedgången.
signals.reasoning: Stillfront has fallen back to FIB50 and cloud span B, and with the lagging lines under both price and cloud it is critical this level is respected; otherwise the risk is high that FIB62 is punctured, triggering a move toward 3.43-3.50. Tobbe is negative for now and reads bounces as pause formations in the downtrend; only a break above the standard line / MA200 and then the recent short-term top would flip the view.
sell_triggers: if price breaks above the standard line / MA200
if the recent short-term top is taken out
if FIB50 / cloud span B holds firmly as support

signals.context: Testing support at cloud span B just above FIB62; wants the level retaken quickly or risks a fall toward ~188 USD.
signals.name: Take-Two Interactive
signals.source_quote: Så jag är lite negativ till Take-to-interactive.
signals.reasoning: Take-Two is down testing support in the form of cloud span B, found just above FIB62. Tobbe wants that level taken out quickly; otherwise the risk is high that price falls all the way toward ~188 USD. On balance he is slightly negative.
sell_triggers: if the cloud span B / FIB62 support is reclaimed quickly
if price falls toward 188 USD confirming weakness

signals.context: Failed breakout attempt with a negative reversal; price under MA200 and lagging line under the cloud, though some faint buyer signs in the gap.
signals.name: G5 Entertainment
signals.source_quote: Sen har vi G5 Entertainment som jag också är lite negativ till.
signals.reasoning: G5 made a failed breakout attempt followed by a negative reversal, with price under MA200 and the lagging line above price but under the cloud. There are faint signs buyers are trying, and volume balance is not especially negative; a clear strong close above prior-day high and above cloud span B in the cloud would set up filling the Feb 17 Q4 gap. Until then the standard line holding is key and the bias is slightly negative.
sell_triggers: if the standard line fails to hold
if no strong close above prior-day high and cloud span B appears
if the negative reversal follows through
